fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the finance charge terms.

fields.name: Interest Rate
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to calculate interest for this finance charge code.

fields.name: Minimum Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies a minimum interest charge in LCY.

fields.name: Additional Fee (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies a fee amount in LCY.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the finance charge terms.

fields.name: Interest Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the interest calculation method for this set of finance charge terms.

fields.name: Interest Period (Days)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period that the interest rate applies to. Enter the number of days in the period.

fields.name: Grace Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the grace period length for this set of finance charge terms.

fields.name: Due Date Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that determines how to calculate the due date of the finance charge memo.

fields.name: Interest Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies which entries should be used in interest calculation on finance charge memos.

fields.name: Post Interest
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not interest listed on the finance charge memo should be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts when the finance charge memo is issued.

fields.name: Post Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether or not any additional fee listed on the finance charge memo should be posted to the general ledger and customer accounts when the memo is issued.

fields.name: Line Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description to be used in the Description field on the finance charge memo lines.

fields.name: Add. Line Fee in Interest
fields.tooltip: Specifies that any additional fees are included in the interest calculation for the finance charge.

fields.name: Detailed Lines Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description to be used in the Description field on the finance charge memo lines.
